questions.question: Explain the concept of bagging in ensemble learning, and provide an example of how it can be applied to a decision tree-based model to reduce overfitting.
Compare and contrast subaggregation and random bagging, highlighting their strengths and weaknesses in terms of handling class imbalance and dealing with correlated features.

A decision tree-based model is stumped by an extremely imbalanced dataset, where one class has a significantly larger number of instances than the other. Describe the potential issues with the model and propose a suitable approach to address the imbalance.
